config.title: Kalendarz zadañ
config.script:
#include "50105" #include "50106" #include "50207" #include "50202" #include "50122" #include "50126" 'harui #include "50101" 'fire_choice_list #include "50200" dim so function fopen():fopen = false #ifdef NOWY_KALENDARZ g_strWykonawcaWhere = "pWykonawca=" + cstr(getCurrentWykonawcaID()) g_dCurrentDate = trans_.var(GVAR_TODAY) #endif dim pHli,pHli2,id if trans_.isvar(APPVAR_CALENDAR_OPTIONS) then select case trans_.var(APPVAR_CALENDAR_OPTIONS): case CALENDAR_OPTIONS_CURRENT_DAY: if not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_RAPORT_KALENDARZ_DZIS)) then exit function end if #ifdef NOWY_KALENDARZ g_eCalMode = 1 frefresh fopen = true exit function #else page_.ctrl(10).value=clng(1)'widok dzien page_.ctrl(20).value="1" page_.ctrl(21).value="1" page_.ctrl(51).value="1" page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(1) set pHli2 = doc_.createhli() pHli2.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ) = 0 set page_.ctrl(31).userprop = pHli2 if not getCurrentWykonawca() is nothing then id = getCurrentWykonawcaID() page_.ctrl(50).value="0"'nie dodajemy wykonawcy page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(2) else id=0 page_.ctrl(50).value="1"'dodajemy wpis o wykonawcy page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(1) end if set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ) = id set page_.ctrl(41).userprop = pHli dim strQuery:strQuery=query_for_day_view(srvDate(),cstr(page_.ctrl(41).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)),cstr(page_.ctrl(31).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) , page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(2) , page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(2),page_.ctrl(20).value="0") generate_day_view page_.ctrl(20).value="1",page_.ctrl(21).value="1" , srvDate() , strQuery , page_.ctrl(50).value="1" , page_.ctrl(51).value="1" fopen=false exit function #endif ' page_.goback case CALENDAR_OPTIONS_CURRENT_WEEK: if not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_RAPORT_KALENDARZ_TYDZIEN)) then exit function end if #ifdef NOWY_KALENDARZ g_eCalMode = 2 frefresh fopen = true exit function #else page_.ctrl(10).value=clng(2)' page_.ctrl(20).value="1" page_.ctrl(21).value="1" page_.ctrl(51).value="1" page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(1) set pHli2 = doc_.createhli() pHli2.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ) = 0 set page_.ctrl(31).userprop = pHli2 if not getCurrentWykonawca() is nothing then id = getCurrentWykonawcaID() page_.ctrl(50).value="0"'nie dodajemy wykonawcy page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(2) else id=0 page_.ctrl(50).value="1"'dodajemy wpis o wykonawcy page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(1) end if set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ) = id set page_.ctrl(41).userprop = pHli generate_week_view() fopen=false exit function ' page_.goback() #endif end select else if not HARUI(UAR_CMDID(CMDID_RAPORT_KALENDARZ_MIESIAC)) then exit function end if #ifdef NOWY_KALENDARZ g_eCalMode = 3 frefresh fopen = true exit function #else page_.ctrl(10).value=clng(1) page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(1) page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(1) set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ) = 0 set page_.ctrl(41).userprop = pHli set pHli2 = doc_.createhli() pHli2.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ) = 0 set page_.ctrl(31).userprop = pHli2 #endif end if fopen = true end function function c11_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) c11_ondataentered = true end function function c11_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c11_ongetdata=true end function function c21_ondataentered(oCtrl, newValue) c21_ondataentered = true end function function c21_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) c21_ongetdata=true end function function choose_client dim choice : choice = fire_choice_list( TYPEID_N5KLIENT,"","","","","") if choice <> 0 then dim pKlient:set pKlient = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT , choice) if not pKlient is nothing then page_.ctrl(31).text=pKlient.strNazwa page_.ctrl(30).value = clng(2) end if end if dim pHli set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ) = choice set page_.ctrl(31).userprop = pHli end function function choose_wyk dim choice : choice = fire_choice_list( TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA,"","","","","") if choice <> 0 then dim pWyk:set pWyk = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA , choice) if not pWyk is nothing then page_.ctrl(41).text=pWyk.strIndeks page_.ctrl(40).value = clng(2) end if end if dim pHli set pHli = doc_.createhli() pHli.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ) = choice set page_.ctrl(41).userprop = pHli end function function count_colspan_end_for_day(byval max , byval ltime) if (ltime/100)-(ltime\100) =0 then count_colspan_end_for_day = (max-ltime\100) + 2 else count_colspan_end_for_day = (max-ltime\100) + 1 end if end function function count_colspan_start_for_day(byval min , byval ltime) count_colspan_start_for_day = clng(ltime/100) - clng(min) end function 'funckja renerujÄ…ca jeden wiersz function generate_day_entry(byval pRecord , byval min, byval max, byref strASAP , byref strNormal , byref strNoMeter , lpForASAP , lpForNormal , lpForNoMeter , bWykonawca , bKlient , dDate) dim strRow dim strColor dim strLP select case pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value case 1: strColor="#FFB7B7" strLP = cstr(lpForASAP) lpForASAP = lpForASAP + 1 case 5: strColor= "#C4D6EA" strLP = cstr(lpForNoMeter) lpForNoMeter = lpForNoMeter + 1 case else : strColor="#D4D4D4" strLP = cstr(lpForNormal) lpForNormal = lpForNormal + 1 end select 'poczÄ…tek wiersza strRow="" strRow=strRow + ""+strLP+"" dim colspan ' colspan dla kolumn z zadaniem colspan=max-min + 1 dim count_empty_start:count_empty_start=0 dim count_empty_end:count_empty_end=0 'liczymy ile potrzeba pustych kolumn przed zadaniem if pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value <>1 and pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value <> 5 then if pRecord.fields("ddataTerminRozp").value = dDate then count_empty_start=count_colspan_start_for_day(min,pRecord.fields("tCzasTerminRozp").value) end if end if 'liczymy ile potrzeba pustych kolumn po zadaniu if pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value <>1 and pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value <> 5 then if pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value = dDate then count_empty_end = count_colspan_end_for_day(max,pRecord.fields("tCzasTerminZak").value) end if end if if (pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value = 1 or pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value = 5) and pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value <> 1 then count_empty_end = 0 end if 'puste kolumny przed zadaniem if count_empty_start>0 then strRow=strRow + "" end if ' count_empty_end = count_empty_end -1 if count_empty_end<0 then count_empty_end = 0 end if if count_empty_start<0 then count_empty_start = 0 end if colspan=colspan - count_empty_end - count_empty_start 'wlasciwe dane strRow=strRow + "" strRow=strRow+"" 'generujemy tez wpisy o kliencie i wykonacy jesli zazaczono, nie jest null i nie ograniczamy sie do wybranego if bWykonawca and not isnull(pRecord.fields("strIndeks").value) and page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(1) then strRow=strRow + "" end if if bKlient and not isnull(pRecord.fields("strNazwa").value) and page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(1) then strRow=strRow + "" end if strRow=strRow + "" 'puste kolumny po zadaniu if count_empty_end>0 then strRow=strRow + "" end if strRow=strRow+"" select case pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value case 1: strASAP = strASAP + strRow case 5: strNoMeter = strNoMeter + strRow case else: strNormal = strNormal + strRow end select end function function generate_empty_day_col(byval i , byref strRow) if i>0 then strRow=strRow + "" end if end function function generate_week_entry(byval pRecord , byval minDate , byval maxDate , byref strASAP , byref strNormal , byref strNoMeter, byref lpForASAP , byref lpForNoMeter , byref lpForNormal) dim strRow dim strColor dim strLP select case pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value case 1: strColor="#FFB7B7" strLP = cstr(lpForASAP) if strLP<>"0" then lpForASAP = lpForASAP + 1 end if case 5: strColor= "#C4D6EA" strLP = cstr(lpForNoMeter) if strLP<>"0" then lpForNoMeter = lpForNoMeter + 1 end if case else : strColor="#D4D4D4" strLP = cstr(lpForNormal) if strLP<>"0" then lpForNormal = lpForNormal + 1 end if end select 'poczÄ…tek wiersza strRow="" if strLP <> "0" then strRow=strRow + ""+strLP+"" end if dim colspan ' colspan dla kolumn z zadaniem colspan=7 ' poczÄ…tkowy colpsan to ilosc dni tygodnia dim count_empty_start:count_empty_start=0 dim count_empty_end:count_empty_end=0 'trzeba dodac pustÄ… kolumne przed zadaniem 'liczymy ile potrzeba pustych kolumn przed zadaniem if pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value <>1 and pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value <> 5 then if pRecord.fields("ddataTerminRozp").value >= minDate and pRecord.fields("dDataTerminRozp").value <= maxDate then count_empty_start=pRecord.fields("dDataTerminRozp").value - minDate end if end if 'liczymy ile potrzeba pustych kolumn po zadaniu if pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value <>1 and pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value <> 5 then if pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value >= minDate and pRecord.fields("dDataTerminZak").value <= maxDate then count_empty_end=maxDate - pRecord.fields("dDataTerminZak").value end if end if generate_empty_day_col count_empty_start , strRow colspan=colspan - count_empty_end - count_empty_start 'wlasciwe dane strRow=strRow + "" strRow=strRow+"" 'generujemy tez wpisy o kliencie i wykonacy jesli zazaczono, nie jest null i nie ograniczamy sie do wybranego if page_.ctrl(50).value="1" and not isnull(pRecord.fields("strIndeks").value) and page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(1) then strRow=strRow + "" end if if page_.ctrl(51).value="1" and not isnull(pRecord.fields("strNazwa").value) and page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(1) then strRow=strRow + "" end if strRow=strRow + "" 'puste kolumny po zadaniu generate_empty_day_col count_empty_end , strRow 'if count_empty_end>0 then ' strRow=strRow + "" 'end if strRow=strRow+"" select case pRecord.fields("eTypTerminRozp").value case 1: strASAP = strASAP + strRow case 5: strNoMeter = strNoMeter + strRow case else: strNormal = strNormal + strRow end select end function 'to do - odczytywanie z profilu function get_min_max_hour(byref minTime , byref maxTime , byval dDate) minTime=25 maxTime=-1 dim maxFromProf:maxFromProf=getuserprofileLong(USERPROF_CALENDAR_MAX) dim minFromProf:minFromProf=getuserprofileLong(USERPROF_CALENDAR_MIN) minTime=minFromProf maxTime=maxFromProf dim strWhere strWhere="(nStatus>=10 and nStatus<40) and (((dDataTerminRozp <= "+ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDate)+" and dDataTerminZak >= "+doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDate)+") or ( eTypTerminRozp=5 or eTypTerminRozp=1))) and (eTypTerminRozp<5) and (eTypTerminRozp>1)" dim pCursor:set pCursor=trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,strWhere,"eTypTerminRozp","") dim pZadanie for each pZadanie in pCursor if pZadanie.eTypTerminZak=1 or pZadanie.eTypTerminZak=5 or pZadanie.dDataTerminZak>dDate then maxTime=23 else maxTime = clng(max(maxtime,pZadanie.tCzasTerminZak/100)) end if if pZadanie.dDataTerminRozp < dDate then minTime = 0 else minTime = clng(min(mintime,pZadanie.tCzasTerminRozp/100)) end if next if minTime=2500 then minTime = 0 end if if maxTime=-1 then maxTime = 0 end if end function 'funkcja zwracajÄ…ca w zaleznoÅ›ci od stanu kontroplek nagÅ‚Ã³wek funckji 'generujacej raport dla danego dnia - wklejone to zostanie do kodu strony function get_function_hdr_for_show_day() dim strFun strFun="dim pRM:set pRM=doc_.getmodule(43013)" + vbNewLine strFun=strFun + "dim strQuery:strQuery = pRM.query_for_day_view(Cdate(pHli.prop(APPVARDATE)) , " + cstr(page_.ctrl(41).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) + " , " + cstr(page_.ctrl(31).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) + " , " if page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(2) then strFun = strFun + " true , " else strFun = strFun + " false , " end if if page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(2) then strFun = strFun + " true , " else strFun = strFun + " false , " end if if page_.ctrl(20).value="0" then strFun = strFun + " true )" else strFun = strFun + " false )" end if strFun = strFun + vbNewLine strFun = strFun + "pRM.generate_day_view " if page_.ctrl(20).value="1" then strFun = strFun + " true," else strFun = strFun + " false," end if if page_.ctrl(21).value="1" then strFun = strFun + " true," else strFun = strFun + " false," end if strFun = strFun + "Cdate(pHli.prop(APPVARDATE)),strQuery," if page_.ctrl(50).value="1" then strFun = strFun + " true , " else strFun = strFun + " false , " end if if page_.ctrl(51).value="1" then strFun = strFun + " true " + vbNewLine else strFun = strFun + " false " + vbNewLine end if get_function_hdr_for_show_day = strFun end function function get_navo_page_hdr(byref xmlNavoPage,byval strTable,byval strTitle, byval strTitle2 , byval dDate) xmlNavoPage = "" + vbNewLine xmlNavoPage = xmlNavoPage + "" + vbNewLine xmlNavoPage = xmlNavoPage + "<![CD" + "AT" + "A[" + strTitle2 +"]"+"]>" + vbNewLine xmlNavoPage = xmlNavoPage + "" + vbNewLine xmlNavoPage = xmlNavoPage + "" +vbNewLine + "
" + vbNewLine + "
" + vbNewLine + "" + vbNewLine + "" + strTitle + "
" + vbNewLine xmlNavoPage = xmlNavoPage + strTable + vbNewLine xmlNavoPage = xmlNavoPage + "" + vbNewLine + "
" + vbNewLine + "
" + vbNewLine + "" + vbNewLine end function function generate_day_view(byval bAsap, byval bNoMeter , byval dDate ,byval strQuery , byval bWykonawca , bKlient) dim xmlNavoPage,minHour,maxHour,i get_min_max_hour minHour,maxHour,dDate 'naglowek tabelki dim strASAP,strNormal,strNoMeter,strTable 'naglowek sekcji z zadniami ASAP - wiersz opisu strASAP = ""+ASAP+"" 'naglowek sekcji z zdaniami terminowymi - wiersz opisu, wiersz z LP + kolejne godziny strNormal = "" + vbNewLine if bAsap or bNoMeter then ' dodajemy strNormal = strNormal + ""+NRM+"" + vbNewLine end if strNormal = strNormal + "LP" + vbNewLine for i=minHour to maxHour strNormal=strNormal+""+cstr(i) +":00" next strNormal=strNormal + "" 'naglowek sekcji z zadniami "obojetnymi" - wiersz opisu + pierwsza kolumna LP strNoMeter = "" +_ ""+NM+"" 'jej zawartosc dim lpForASAP,lpForNoMeter,lpforNormal lpForASAP = 1 lpForNoMeter = 1 lpforNormal = 1 dim oRecordset:set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(strQuery) while not oRecordset.eof generate_day_entry oRecordset,minHour,maxHour,strASAP,strNormal,strNoMeter,lpForASAP,lpForNoMeter,lpForNormal , bWykonawca , bKlient , dDate oRecordset.movenext wend strTable="" if bAsap then strTable=strTable + strASAP end if strTable= strTable + strNormal if bNoMeter then strTable=strTable + strNoMeter end if strTable=strTable + "
" 'naglowek strony get_navo_page_hdr xmlNavoPage,strTable,"KALENDARZ","Kalendarz na " + cstr(dDate), dDate set so = doc_.createstreamobj so.write xmlNavoPage #ifdef _DEBUG so.save "c:\temp\!!!!test.xml" #endif dim pHli set pHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE") set pHli.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE)=so.getstream() dim pPage:set pPage=doc_.getpagehli(pHli) if not pPage is nothing then pPage.domodalauto() end if end function function query_for_day_view(byval dDate , byval idWyk , byval idKlient , byval bWyk , byval bKlient , byval bSection) dim oSelect: set oSelect = new basic_string oSelect.set_separator ","' + vbNewLine oSelect.set_group_start "" oSelect.set_group_end "" oSelect.append "n5zadanie.idobj,n5zadanie.strTemat,n5zadanie.nStatus,n5zadanie.eTypTerminRozp,n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp,n5zadanie.tCzasTerminRozp,n5zadanie.eTypTerminZak,n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak,n5zadanie.tCzasTerminZak,n5klient.strNazwa,n5wykonawca.strIndeks" oSelect.append "case n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp when 1 then -1 when 2 then n5zadanie.tCzasTerminRozp when 3 then n5zadanie.tCzasTerminRozp when 4 then n5zadanie.tCzasTerminRozp when 5 then 2500 end as sort" dim oFrom: set oFrom = new basic_string oFrom.set_separator " left join "' + vbNewLine oFrom.set_group_start "" oFrom.set_group_end "" oFrom.append "n5zadanie" oFrom.append "n5klient on pKlient=n5klient.idobj" oFrom.append "n5wykonawca on pWykonawca=n5wykonawca.idobj" dim oWhere: set oWhere = new basic_string oWhere.set_separator " and "' + vbNewLine oWhere.set_group_start "(" oWhere.set_group_end ")" 'filtr automatyczny - najpierw status oWhere.append "nStatus>=10 and nStatus<40" 'potrzebujemy zadania ktorych okres wykonywania zazebia sie z dniem dzisiejszym oWhere.append "((dDataTerminRozp <= " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDate) + " and dDataTerminZak >= " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDate) + ") or ( eTypTerminRozp=5 or eTypTerminRozp=1) or(dDataTerminRozp<="+doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDate)+" and eTypTerminZak=1) or(dDataTerminRozp <= "+doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(dDate)+" and eTypTerminZak=5) )" 'filtrujemy dodatkowe sekcje if bSection then oWhere.append "eTypTerminRozp<5" oWhere.append "eTypTerminRozp>1" end if if bWyk then oWhere.append "pWykonawca=" + cstr(idWyk)'cstr(page_.ctrl(41).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) end if if bKlient then oWhere.append "pKlient=" + cstr(idKlient)'cstr(page_.ctrl(31).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) end if dim oOrder: set oOrder = new basic_string oOrder.set_separator ","' + vbNewLine oOrder.set_group_start "" oOrder.set_group_end "" oOrder.append "sort" query_for_day_view = " select " + oSelect.c_str() + " from " + oFrom.c_str() + " where " + oWhere.c_str() + " order by " + oOrder.c_str() end function function query_for_week_view(byval minDate, byval maxDate) dim oSelect: set oSelect = new basic_string oSelect.set_separator "," + vbNewLine oSelect.set_group_start "" oSelect.set_group_end "" oSelect.append "n5zadanie.idobj,n5zadanie.strTemat,n5zadanie.nStatus,n5zadanie.eTypTerminRozp,n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp,n5zadanie.tCzasTerminRozp,n5zadanie.eTypTerminZak,n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak,n5zadanie.tCzasTerminZak,n5klient.strNazwa,n5wykonawca.strIndeks" oSelect.append "case n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp when 1 then "+ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(doc_.afc.globals.nulldate()) +" when 2 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 3 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 4 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 5 then " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(DateSerial(2099,12,31)) + " end as sort1" oSelect.append "case n5zadanie.eTypterminZak when 1 then "+ doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(doc_.afc.globals.nulldate()) +" when 2 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 3 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 4 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 5 then " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(DateSerial(2099,12,31)) + " end as sort2" dim oFrom: set oFrom = new basic_string oFrom.set_separator " left join " + vbNewLine oFrom.set_group_start "" oFrom.set_group_end "" oFrom.append "n5zadanie" oFrom.append "n5klient on pKlient=n5klient.idobj" oFrom.append "n5wykonawca on pWykonawca=n5wykonawca.idobj" dim oWhere: set oWhere = new basic_string oWhere.set_separator " and " + vbNewLine oWhere.set_group_start "(" oWhere.set_group_end ")" 'filtr automatyczny - najpierw status oWhere.append "nStatus>=10 and nStatus<40" 'potrzebujemy zadania ktorych okres wykonywania zazebia sie z aktualnym tygodniem roboczym oWhere.append "((dDataTerminRozp BETWEEN " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(minDate)+ " AND " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(maxDate) + " or dDataTerminZak BETWEEN " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(minDate) + " AND " + doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(maxDate) + ") or ( eTypTerminRozp=5 or eTypTerminRozp=1))" 'filtrujemy dodatkowe sekcje if page_.ctrl(20).value="0" then oWhere.append "eTypTerminRozp<5" oWhere.append "eTypTerminRozp>1" end if if page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(2) then oWhere.append "pWykonawca=" + cstr(page_.ctrl(41).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) end if if page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(2) then oWhere.append "pKlient=" + cstr(page_.ctrl(31).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) end if dim oOrder: set oOrder = new basic_string oOrder.set_separator "," + vbNewLine oOrder.set_group_start "" oOrder.set_group_end "" oOrder.append "sort1" oOrder.append "sort2 asc" query_for_week_view = " select " + oSelect.c_str() + vbNewLine + " from " + oFrom.c_str() + vbNewLine + " where " + oWhere.c_str() + " order by " + oOrder.c_str() end function function generate_week_view() dim xmlNavoPage dim strASAP,strNormal,strNoMeter,strTable,strTimeScale dim minDate,maxDate dim dayOfWeek:dayOfWeek = WeekDay(srvDate,vbMonday) maxDate = DateSerial(year(srvDate()),month(srvDate()),day(srvDate()) + 7 - dayOfWeek ) minDate = DateSerial(year(srvDate()),month(srvDate()),day(srvDate()) - dayOfWeek + 1 ) strTimeScale="LP" +_ "PoniedziaÅ‚ek"+_ "Wtorek"+_ "Åšroda"+_ "Czwartek"+_ "PiÄ…tek"+_ "Sobota"+_ "Niedziela" strASAP = ""+ASAP+"" strNormal = "" + vbNewLine if page_.ctrl(20).value="1" or page_.ctrl(21).value="1" then strNormal = strNormal + ""+NRM+"" + vbNewLine end if strNormal = strNormal + strTimeScale strNoMeter = ""+NM+"" strTable="" dim lpForASAP,lpForNoMeter,lpforNormal lpForASAP = 1 lpForNoMeter = 1 lpforNormal = 1 dim oRecordset:set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(query_for_week_view(minDate,maxDate)) while not oRecordset.eof generate_week_entry oRecordset,minDate,maxDate , strASAP,strNormal,strNoMeter,lpForASAP,lpForNoMeter,lpForNormal oRecordset.movenext wend if page_.ctrl(20).value="1" then strTable=strTable + strASAP end if strTable= strTable + strNormal if page_.ctrl(21).value="1" then strTable=strTable + strNoMeter end if strTable=strTable + "
" get_navo_page_hdr xmlNavoPage,strTable," KALENDARZ ","Kalendarz od " + cstr(minDate) + " do " + cstr(maxDate) , srvDate() set so = doc_.createstreamobj so.write xmlNavoPage #ifdef _DEBUG so.save "c:\temp\!!!!test.xml" dim soSql : set soSql = doc_.createstreamobj soSql.write query_for_week_view(minDate,maxDate) soSql.save "c:\temp\!!!!test.sql" #endif dim pHli set pHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE") set pHli.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE)=so.getstream() dim pPage:set pPage=doc_.getpagehli(pHli) if not pPage is nothing then pPage.domodalauto() end if end function function query_for_month_view(byval minDate, byval maxDate) query_for_month_view = "select n5zadanie.idobj,n5zadanie.strTemat,n5zadanie.nStatus,n5zadanie.eTypTerminRozp,n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp,n5zadanie.tCzasTerminRozp,n5zadanie.eTypTerminZak,n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak,n5zadanie.tCzasTerminZak,n5klient.strNazwa,n5wykonawca.strIndeks," + vbNewLine +_ "case n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp when 1 then CONVERT(DATETIME, '1899-12-31', 111) when 2 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 3 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 4 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 5 then CONVERT(DATETIME, '2099-12-31', 111) end as sort1," + vbNewLine +_ "case n5zadanie.eTypterminZak when 1 then CONVERT(DATETIME, '1899-12-31', 111) when 2 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 3 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 4 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 5 then CONVERT(DATETIME, '2099-12-31', 111) end as sort2 " + vbNewLine +_ "from n5zadanie left join n5klient on pKlient=n5klient.idobj left join n5wykonawca on pWykonawca=n5wykonawca.idobj" + vbNewLine +_ "where (nStatus>=10 and nStatus<40) and ((dDataTerminRozp <=" +doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(maxDate)+ " and dDataTerminZak >= " +doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(minDate)+ ") or(dDataTerminRozp <= "+doc_.afc.convert.date2SQL(maxDate)+" and eTypterminZak in (1,5))) and eTypTerminRozp<5 and eTypTerminRozp>1" + vbNewLine if page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(2) then query_for_month_view = query_for_month_view + "and (pWykonawca=" + cstr(page_.ctrl(41).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) + ")" + vbNewLine end if if page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(2) then query_for_month_view = query_for_month_view + "and (pKlient=" + cstr(page_.ctrl(31).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) + ")" + vbNewLine end if query_for_month_view = query_for_month_view + "order by sort1,sort2 asc" + vbNewLine end function function query_for_month_view_section(byval eTyp ) query_for_month_view_section = "select n5zadanie.idobj,n5zadanie.strTemat,n5zadanie.nStatus,n5zadanie.eTypTerminRozp,n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp,n5zadanie.tCzasTerminRozp,n5zadanie.eTypTerminZak,n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak,n5zadanie.tCzasTerminZak,n5klient.strNazwa,n5wykonawca.strIndeks," + vbNewLine +_ "case n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp when 1 then CONVERT(DATETIME, '1899-12-31', 111) when 2 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 3 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 4 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminRozp when 5 then CONVERT(DATETIME, '2099-12-31', 111) end as sort1," + vbNewLine +_ "case n5zadanie.eTypterminZak when 1 then CONVERT(DATETIME, '1899-12-31', 111) when 2 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 3 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 4 then n5zadanie.dDataTerminZak when 5 then CONVERT(DATETIME, '2099-12-31', 111) end as sort2 " + vbNewLine +_ "from n5zadanie left join n5klient on pKlient=n5klient.idobj left join n5wykonawca on pWykonawca=n5wykonawca.idobj" + vbNewLine +_ "where (nStatus>=10 and nStatus<40) and (eTypTerminRozp="+cstr(eTyp)+")" + vbNewLine if page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(2) then query_for_month_view_section = query_for_month_view_section + "and (pWykonawca=" + cstr(page_.ctrl(41).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) + ")" + vbNewLine end if if page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(2) then query_for_month_view_section = query_for_month_view_section + "and (pKlient=" + cstr(page_.ctrl(31).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) + ")" + vbNewLine end if query_for_month_view_section = query_for_month_view_section + "order by sort1,sort2 asc" + vbNewLine end function function generate_month_entry(byval pRecord , byval minDate , byval maxDate , byref strWeek1 , byref strWeek2, byref strWeek3, byref strWeek4, byref strWeek5, byref strWeek6) dim startweek , endweek , count_empty_start , count_empty_end dim min,colspan randomize dim strColor:strColor="backcolor='#"+ hex(rgb(Int((230 - 180 + 1) * Rnd + 180),Int((230 - 180 + 1) * Rnd + 180),Int((230 - 180 + 1) * Rnd + 180))) +"'" dim strRow strRow="" 'generujemy tez wpisy o kliencie i wykonacy jesli zazaczono, nie jest null i nie ograniczamy sie do wybranego if page_.ctrl(50).value="1" and not isnull(pRecord.fields("strIndeks").value) and page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(1) then strRow=strRow + "" end if if page_.ctrl(51).value="1" and not isnull(pRecord.fields("strNazwa").value) and page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(1) then strRow=strRow + "" end if dim down:down=WeekDay(minDate,vbMonday)-1 dim up:up=7 - WeekDay(maxDate,vbMonday) startweek = max (((pRecord.fields("dDataTerminRozp").value - minDate + down)\7)+1,1) endweek = ((pRecord.fields("dDataTerminZak").value - minDate + down)\7)+1 if endweek > ((maxDate+up)-(minDate-down) + 1)/7 or pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value=1 or pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value=5 then endweek = ((maxDate+up)-(minDate-down) + 1)/7 end if 'dane potrzebne do wstawienia wpisu - zrobimy to tam, gdzie mamy najwiecej miejsca 'czyli tam, gdzie colspan byÅ‚ najwiekszy...weeknum to wlasnie numer tego tygodnia dim maxcolspan:maxcolspan=0 dim weeknum:weeknum=0 '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'jedziemy przez pierwszy tydzien (7 dni minus dni z poprzedniego miesiaca minuc cos jesli zadnaie konczy sie w tym samym tygodniu) if startweek=1 then ' count_empty_start = pRecord.fields("ddataTerminRozp").value - minDate if count_empty_start < 0 then count_empty_start = 0 end if 'pierwszy tydzien moze miec dni nie z tego miesiaca - down colspan = 7 - down - count_empty_start strWeek1 = strWeek1 + "" + vbNewLine 'dni poprzedniego miesiÄ…ca + dni przed rozpoczeciem zadania if down + count_empty_start <> 0 then strWeek1 = strWeek1 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek1 = strWeek1 + "" + vbNewLine end if if endweek=1 then count_empty_end = (minDate - down + 6) - pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value colspan = colspan- count_empty_end end if 'wlasciwe zadanie strWeek1 = strWeek1 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek1 = strWeek1 + "" + vbNewLine if count_empty_end<>0 then strWeek1 = strWeek1 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek1 = strWeek1 + "" + vbNewLine end if strWeek1 = strWeek1 + "" + vbNewLine 'gdzie wpis if colspan > maxcolspan then maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=1 end if end if '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'jedziemy przez drugi tydzien - zawsze peÅ‚ne 7 dni ( no chyba ze konczy sie w tym samym tygodniu) if startweek=2 then count_empty_start = pRecord.fields("ddataTerminRozp").value - (minDate - down +7) if count_empty_start < 0 then count_empty_start = 0 end if 'puste przed zadaniem strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" if count_empty_start<> 0 then strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" end if colspan = 7 - count_empty_start 'jesli konczy sie w tym samym tygodniu to trzeba uciac je troszkie .. if endweek=2 then count_empty_end = (minDate - down + 13) - pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value colspan = colspan- count_empty_end end if 'wlasciwe dane strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" 'puste po zadaniu if count_empty_end<>0 then strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine end if strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine if colspan > maxcolspan then maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=2 end if end if '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'jedziemy przez trzeci tydzien - zawsze peÅ‚ne 7 dni ( no chyba ze konczy sie w tym samym tygodniu) if startweek=3 then count_empty_start = pRecord.fields("ddataTerminRozp").value - (minDate - down +14) if count_empty_start < 0 then count_empty_start = 0 end if 'puste przed zadaniem strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" if count_empty_start<> 0 then strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" end if colspan = 7 - count_empty_start 'jesli konczy sie w tym samym tygodniu to trzeba uciac je troszkie .. if endweek=3 then count_empty_end = (minDate - down + 20) - pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value colspan = colspan- count_empty_end end if 'wlasciwe dane strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" 'puste po zadaniu if count_empty_end<>0 then strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" + vbNewLine end if strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" + vbNewLine if colspan > maxcolspan then maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=3 end if end if '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'jedziemy przez czwarty tydzien - zawsze peÅ‚ne 7 dni ( no chyba ze konczy sie w tym samym tygodniu) if startweek=4 then count_empty_start = pRecord.fields("ddataTerminRozp").value - (minDate - down +21) if count_empty_start < 0 then count_empty_start = 0 end if 'puste przed zadaniem strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" if count_empty_start<> 0 then strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" end if colspan = 7 - count_empty_start 'jesli konczy sie w tym samym tygodniu to trzeba uciac je troszkie .. if endweek=4 then count_empty_end = (minDate - down + 27) - pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value colspan = colspan- count_empty_end end if 'wlasciwe dane strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" 'puste po zadaniu if count_empty_end<>0 then strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" + vbNewLine end if strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" + vbNewLine if colspan > maxcolspan then maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=4 end if end if + "" if count_empty_start<> 0 then strWeek5 = strWeek5 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek5 = strWeek5 + "" end if colspan = 7 - count_empty_start 'jesli konczy sie w tym samym tygodniu to trzeba uciac je maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=5 end if end if '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'jedziemy przez szÃ³sty tydzien - uciety (zawsze) o dni vbNewLine strWeek6 = strWeek6 + "" 'puste po zadaniu if count_empty_end + up <>0 then strWeek6 = strWeek6 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek6 = strWeek6 + "" + vbNewLine end if strWeek6 = strWeek6 + "" + vbNewLine if colspan > maxcolspan then maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=6 end if end if '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 'wstawianie peÅ‚nych paskÃ³w dla zadan trwajacych cale tygodnie 'czyli wtedy gdy : if startweek<2 and endweek > 2 and startweek<>endweek then strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine if maxcolspan < 7 then maxcolspan=7 weeknum=2 end if end if if startweek<3 and endweek > 3 and startweek<>endweek then strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" + vbNewLine if maxcolspan < 7 then maxcolspan=7 weeknum=3 end if end if if startweek<4 and endweek > 4 and startweek<>endweek then strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" + vbNewLine if maxcolspan < 7 then maxcolspan=7 weeknum=4 end if end if if startweek<5 and endweek > 5 and startweek<>endweek then strWeek5 = strWeek5 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek5 = strWeek5 + "" + vbNewLine if maxcolspan < 7 then maxcolspan=7 weeknum=5 end if end if '------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ' to jesszcze do zrobienia paski dla zadan ktore sie koncza w okreslonym tygodniu i nie zaczynaja sie w tym samym ' pierwszy tydzien moge pominac, bo to juz obejmuje jeden z warunkow if endweek=2 and startweek<>2 then colspan = 7 count_empty_end = (minDate - down + 13) - pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value colspan = colspan - count_empty_end strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine 'pasek zadania strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine 'pusty pasek if count_empty_end <> 0 then strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine end if strWeek2 = strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine if colspan > maxcolspan then maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=2 end if end if if endweek=3 and startweek<>3 then colspan = 7 count_empty_end = (minDate - down + 20) - pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value colspan = colspan - count_empty_end strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" + vbNewLine 'pasek zadania strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "%ROW%" + vbNewLine strWeek3 = strWeek3 + "" + maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=3 end if end if if endweek=4 and startweek<>4 then colspan = 7 count_empty_end = (minDate - down + 27) - pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value if pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value = 1 or pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value = 5 then count_empty_end = up end if colspan = colspan - count_empty_end strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" + vbNewLine 'pasek vbNewLine end if strWeek4 = strWeek4 + "" + vbNewLine if colspan > maxcolspan then maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=4 end if end if if endweek=5 and startweek<>5 then colspan = 7 count_empty_end = (minDate - down + 34) - pRecord.fields("ddataTerminZak").value if pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value = 1 or pRecord.fields("eTypTerminZak").value = 5 then count_empty_end = up end if colspan = colspan - + vbNewLine if colspan > maxcolspan then maxcolspan=colspan weeknum=6 end if end if 'wstawienie w odpowiednim miejsu wpisu select case weeknum case 1: strWeek1=replace(strWeek1,"%ROW%", strRow) 2: strWeek2=replace(strWeek2,"%ROW%", strRow) strWeek1=replace(strWeek1,"%ROW%", "") strWeek3=replace(strWeek3,"%ROW%", "") strWeek4=replace(strWeek4,"%ROW%", "") strWeek5=replace(strWeek5,"%ROW%", "") strWeek6=replace(strWeek6,"%ROW%", "") case 3: strWeek3=replace(strWeek3,"%ROW%", strRow) strWeek2=replace(strWeek2,"%ROW%", "") strWeek1=replace(strWeek1,"%ROW%", "") "") strWeek6=replace(strWeek6,"%ROW%", "") case 6: strWeek6=replace(strWeek6,"%ROW%", strRow) strWeek2=replace(strWeek2,"%ROW%", "") strWeek3=replace(strWeek3,"%ROW%", "") strASAP, byval bAsap) dim strRow strRow="" 'generujemy tez wpisy o kliencie i wykonacy jesli zazaczono, nie jest null i nie ograniczamy sie do wybranego if page_.ctrl(50).value="1" and not isnull(pRecord.fields("strIndeks").value) and page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(1) then strRow=strRow + "" end if if page_.ctrl(51).value="1" and not isnull(pRecord.fields("strNazwa").value) and page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(1) then strRow=strRow + "" end if if bAsap then strASAP = strASAP + ""+ strRow +"" else strASAP = strASAP + ""+ strRow +"" end if end function function generate_month_view() 'daty do query dim minDate:minDate = DateSerial(Year(srvDate()),Month(srvDate()),1) dim maxDate:maxDate = DateSerial(Year(srvDate()),Month(srvDate())+1,0) 'offset dim down:down=WeekDay(minDate,vbMonday)-1 dim up:up=7 - WeekDay(maxDate,vbMonday) ' msgbox cstr(down) + vbnewline + cstr(up) dim strASAP,strAllMonth,strNormal,strNoMeter,strTimeScale,strTable dim lpForASAP,lpForNoMeter,lpForNormal lpForASAP=0 lpForNoMeter=0 lpForNormal=0 dim strWeek1,strWeek2,strWeek3,strWeek4,strWeek5,strWeek6 dim countWeeks:countWeeks= ((maxDate+up)-(minDate-down) + 1)/7 'maÅ‚y Å¼arcik :-) to do - usunÄ…Ä‡!!!!! if countWeeks=4 then MessageBox "WOW!!! Witamy wytrwaÅ‚ego uzytkownika programu... Na mÃ³j gust to dziÅ› jest minumum luty 2010 roku :-))))", "Kalendarz", vbOKOnly, vbInformation end if ' msgbox countWeeks ' dim strDesc:strDesc = 'wiersz ze sklaÄ… czasowÄ… - dni tygodnia bez LP if page_.ctrl(20).value="1" or page_.ctrl(21).value="1" then strTimeScale=strTimeScale+"" + NRM + "" + vbNewLine end if strTimeScale=strTimeScale+"" +_ "PoniedziaÅ‚ek"+ vbNewLine +_ "Wtorek" + vbNewLine +_ "Åšroda" + vbNewLine +_ "Czwartek" + vbNewLine +_ "PiÄ…tek" + vbNewLine +_ "Sobota" + vbNewLine +_ "Niedziela" + vbNewLine dim tmpDate:tmpDate=minDate dim i 'wiersze kolejnych tygodni strWeek1="" 'dodanie do pierwszego tygodnia pustych kolumn if down<>0 then strWeek1=strWeek1+"" end if for i=1 to (7-down) strWeek1=strWeek1+""+cstr(day(tmpDate))+"" tmpDate = tmpDate+1 next strWeek1=strWeek1+"" strWeek2="" + vbNewLine strWeek3="" + vbNewLine strWeek4="" + vbNewLine for i=1 to 7 strWeek2=strWeek2+""+cstr(day(tmpDate))+"" + vbNewLine strWeek3=strWeek3+""+cstr(day(tmpDate + 7))+"" + vbNewLine strWeek4=strWeek4+""+cstr(day(tmpDate + 14))+"" + vbNewLine tmpDate = tmpDate + 1 next tmpDate = tmpDate + 14 strWeek2=strWeek2 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek3=strWeek3 + "" + vbNewLine strWeek4=strWeek4 + "" + vbNewLine dim strEmptyRow:strEmptyRow="" if countWeeks>4 then strWeek5="" + vbNewLine dim p if countWeeks=6 then P = 7 else p = 7-up end if for i=1 to p strWeek5=strWeek5+""+cstr(day(tmpDate))+"" tmpDate = tmpDate+1 next if p <> 7 then strWeek5=strWeek5+"" end if strWeek5=strWeek5 + "" + vbNewLine end if if countWeeks=6 then strWeek6="" + vbNewLine for i=1 to (7-up) strWeek6=strWeek6+""+cstr(day(tmpDate))+"" tmpDate = tmpDate+1 next strWeek6=strWeek6+"" strWeek6=strWeek6 + "" + vbNewLine end if 'zadania terminowe dim oRecordset:set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(query_for_month_view(minDate,maxDate)) while not oRecordset.eof generate_month_entry oRecordset , minDate , maxDate , strWeek1 , strWeek2, strWeek3, strWeek4, strWeek5, strWeek6 oRecordset.movenext wend 'zadania asap if page_.ctrl(20).value="1" then strAsap = "" + ASAP + "" set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(query_for_month_view_section(1)) if oRecordset.RecordCount<>0 then while not oRecordset.eof generate_month_entry_asap oRecordset , strASAP , true oRecordset.movenext wend else strASAP = "" end if else strASAP = "" end if ' do wykonaina obojetne kiedy if page_.ctrl(21).value="1" then strNoMeter = "" + NM + "" set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(query_for_month_view_section(5)) if oRecordset.RecordCount<>0 then while not oRecordset.eof generate_month_entry_asap oRecordset , strNoMeter , false oRecordset.movenext wend else strNoMeter = "" end if else strNoMeter = "" end if strNormal = "" if strAsap <> "" then strNormal=strNormal+ strEmptyRow + strASAP end if strNormal=strNormal + strEmptyRow + strTimeScale + strEmptyRow+strWeek1+strEmptyRow+strWeek2+strEmptyRow+strWeek3+strEmptyRow+strWeek4+strEmptyRow+strWeek5+strEmptyRow+strWeek6 if strNoMeter <> "" then strNormal=strNormal + strNoMeter end if strNormal=strNormal + "
" strTable = strTable + strNormal dim xmlNavoPage get_navo_page_hdr xmlNavoPage,strTable,"KALENDARZ","Kalendarz na " + cstr(Year(srvDate())) + "-" + MonthName(Month(srvDate())) , srvDate() set so = doc_.createstreamobj so.write xmlNavoPage #ifdef _DEBUG so.save "c:\temp\!!!!test.xml" #endif dim pHli set pHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE") set pHli.prop(GVAR_DESTPAGE)=so.getstream() dim pPage:set pPage=doc_.getpagehli(pHli) if not pPage is nothing then pPage.domodalauto() end if end function function generate() select case clng(page_.ctrl(10).value) case 1 : dim strQuery:strQuery=query_for_day_view(srvDate(),cstr(page_.ctrl(41).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)),cstr(page_.ctrl(31).userprop.prop(USER_PROP_IDOBJ)) , page_.ctrl(40).value=clng(2) , page_.ctrl(30).value=clng(2),page_.ctrl(20).value="0") generate_day_view page_.ctrl(20).value="1",page_.ctrl(21).value="1" , srvDate() , strQuery , page_.ctrl(50).value="1" , page_.ctrl(51).value="1" case 2 : generate_week_view() case 3 : generate_month_view() end select page_.goback() end function #comment '------------------------------------------------------------ #include "50203" #include "50222" dim g_dCurrentDate dim g_eCalMode dim g_strWykonawcaWhere function get_where_any(byval strWhereTypTermin) dim strWherePart : strWherePart = "n5zadanie.nStatus between N5ZADANIE_ZLECONE and N5ZADANIE_ZAKONCZONE " #ifdef APPCONFIG_PROTOKOLY if strWhereTypTermin = "(n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp = N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_OBOJETNY)" then strWherePart = strWherePart + "or n5zadanie.nStatus = N5ZADANIE_UTWORZONE " end if #endif #ifdef _RAND if strWhereTypTermin = "(n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp <> N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_NAJSZYBCIEJ and " + _ " n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp <> N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_OBOJETNY)" then get_where_any = "(((" + strWherePart + ") and " + strWhereTypTermin + ")" + vbNewLine +_ "or (n5zadanie.nStatus between N5ZADANIE_UTWORZONE and N5ZADANIE_WSTRZYMANE and n5zadanie.dDataPrzyp <> {d '1899-12-31'}) " + vbNewLine +_ "or (n5zadanie.nStatus = N5ZADANIE_ZAKONCZONE)) " + vbNewLine +_ " and (" + g_strWykonawcaWhere + ")" else get_where_any = _ "(" + strWherePart + ")" + _ " and " + strWhereTypTermin + _ " and (" + g_strWykonawcaWhere + ")" end if #else get_where_any = _ "(" + strWherePart + ")" + _ " and " + strWhereTypTermin + _ " and (" + g_strWykonawcaWhere + ")" #endif end function function get_cursor_terminowe() set get_cursor_terminowe = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE, _ get_where_any("(n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp <> N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_NAJSZYBCIEJ and " + _ " n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp <> N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_OBOJETNY)"),"","") end function function get_where_asap() get_where_asap = _ get_where_any("(n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp = N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_NAJSZYBCIEJ)") end function function get_where_other() get_where_other = _ get_where_any("(n5zadanie.eTypterminRozp = N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_OBOJETNY)") end function function c##CTRLID_VIEW_MODE##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c##CTRLID_VIEW_MODE##_ongetdata=true oCtrl.value = clng(g_eCalMode) end function function c##CTRLID_VIEW_MODE##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) if newValue <> g_eCalMode then g_eCalMode = newValue frefresh end if c##CTRLID_VIEW_MODE##_ondataentered=true end function function on_apply_filter() #ifdef _ABAKUS dim strWhere : strWhere = "select idobj from n5sod where strNazwa like 'Pozwól na podgl¹d zadañ innych osób'" if not doc_.getmodule(60106).FindFreeRight(strWhere) then MessageBox "Nie posiadasz uprawnieñ do zmiany parametrów.", "Sprawdzanie uprawnieñ", vbOKOnly, vbInformation exit function end if #endif dim pM60115 : set pM60115 = doc_.getmodule(60115) dim oDPH : set oDPH = pM60115.new_nx_dialog_param_helper() oDPH.add_binding TYPEID_N5WYKONAWCA,"strIndeks","strIndeks","n5zadanie.pWykonawca","" dim strQuery : strQuery = "%1" if oDPH.acquire_parameters_ui("Parametry kalendarza",strQuery) = 0 then exit function end if g_strWykonawcaWhere = strQuery frefresh end function function on_previous_screen() select case g_eCalMode case 1 g_dCurrentDate = g_dCurrentDate - 1 case 2 g_dCurrentDate = g_dCurrentDate - 7 case 3 g_dCurrentDate = dateserial(year(g_dCurrentDate),month(g_dCurrentDate) - 1,day(g_dCurrentDate)) end select frefresh end function function on_next_screen() select case g_eCalMode case 1 g_dCurrentDate = g_dCurrentDate + 1 case 2 g_dCurrentDate = g_dCurrentDate + 7 case 3 g_dCurrentDate = dateserial(year(g_dCurrentDate),month(g_dCurrentDate) + 1,day(g_dCurrentDate)) end select frefresh end function function frefresh() select case g_eCalMode case 1 build_day_view g_dCurrentDate case 2 build_week_view g_dCurrentDate case 3 build_month_view g_dCurrentDate end select dim pM43009 : set pM43009 = doc_.getmodule(43009) page_.ctrl(CTRLID_ASAP_CONTAINER).removeall page_.addxml CTRLID_ASAP_CONTAINER, _ pM43009.nx_generate_table_result(nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE) _ .raports.get_raport_by_name("@zadania_do_wykonania@"),1000,get_where_asap(),1).getstring() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_OTHER_CONTAINER).removeall page_.addxml CTRLID_OTHER_CONTAINER, _ pM43009.nx_generate_table_result(nx_.apprep.objects.get_object(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE) _ .raports.get_raport_by_name("@zadania_do_wykonania@"),1000,get_where_other(),1).getstring() end function function add_zadanie_info(byref oContainer,byref oZadanie,byval bFirstEntry,byval bLastEntry) dim oTxtCtrl : set oTxtCtrl = oContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_STATICEX,-1) dim strText : strText = oZadanie.strTemat if not oZadanie.pKlient is nothing then strText = strText + " (" + oZadanie.pKlient.text + ")" end if if not bLastEntry then strText = strText + "..." end if if not bFirstEntry then strText = "..." + strText end if #ifdef _RAND if g_eCalMode = 3 then if Len(strText) > 20 then oTxtCtrl.text = Left(strText,17) + "..." else oTxtCtrl.text = strText end if else oTxtCtrl.text = strText end if #else oTxtCtrl.text = strText #endif dim strHLI : strHLI = trans_.afc.convert.Formatter("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE,%1)") _ (oZadanie.idobj).done() set oTxtCtrl.hli = doc_.createhlistr(strHLI) end function function build_week_view(byval dMainDate) dim oParaCtrl dim pCBModule : set pCBModule = doc_.getmodule(60231) dim pContainerWeek : set pContainerWeek = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CALENDAR_CONTAINER) pContainerWeek.removeall dim oCalBldrWeek : set oCalBldrWeek = pCBModule.get_calendar_builder(pContainerWeek,2,dMainDate) oCalBldrWeek.build_frame dim oZadaniaCursor : set oZadaniaCursor = get_cursor_terminowe() dim oZadanie for each oZadanie in oZadaniaCursor dim dTaskDateStart, dTaskDateEnd #ifndef _RAND dTaskDateStart = oZadanie.dDataTerminRozp dTaskDateEnd = oZadanie.dDataTerminZak #else if oZadanie.nStatus >= N5ZADANIE_ZLECONE and oZadanie.nStatus <= N5ZADANIE_ZAKONCZONE _ and oZadanie.eTypterminRozp <> N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_NAJSZYBCIEJ and oZadanie.eTypterminRozp <> N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_OBOJETNY then dTaskDateStart = oZadanie.dDataTerminRozp dTaskDateEnd = oZadanie.dDataTerminZak elseif oZadanie.nStatus >= N5ZADANIE_UTWORZONE and oZadanie.nStatus <= N5ZADANIE_WSTRZYMANE and oZadanie.dDataPrzyp <> trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() then dTaskDateStart = oZadanie.dDataPrzyp dTaskDateEnd = oZadanie.dDataPrzyp else dTaskDateStart = oZadanie.dDataZakon dTaskDateEnd = oZadanie.dDataZakon end if #endif if dTaskDateStart = doc_.afc.globals.nulldate() then dTaskDateStart = dTaskDateEnd end if if dTaskDateEnd = doc_.afc.globals.nulldate() then dTaskDateEnd = dTaskDateStart end if dim dDate for dDate = oCalBldrWeek.firstday to oCalBldrWeek.lastday if dTaskDateStart <= dDate and dTaskDateEnd >= dDate then oCalBldrWeek.currentday = dDate with oCalBldrWeek.cell if .userprop is nothing then set .userprop = doc_.createhlistr("vn1=0") ' licznik elementow end if set oParaCtrl = oCalBldrWeek.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PARAGRAPH,-1) oParaCtrl.border = 0 if .userprop.prop(1) mod 2 then oParaCtrl.backcolor=RGB(255,255,255) else oParaCtrl.backcolor=RGB(&HE6,&HE6,&HFA) end if add_zadanie_info oParaCtrl,oZadanie,(dTaskDateStart = dDate),(dTaskDateEnd = dDate) .userprop.prop(1) = .userprop.prop(1) + 1 end with end if next next end function function build_day_view(byval dMainDate) dim oParaCtrl dim pCBModule : set pCBModule = doc_.getmodule(60231) dim pContainerDay : set pContainerDay = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CALENDAR_CONTAINER) pContainerDay.removeall dim oCalBldrDay : set oCalBldrDay = pCBModule.get_calendar_builder(pContainerDay,1,dMainDate) oCalBldrDay.build_frame dim oZadaniaCursor : set oZadaniaCursor = get_cursor_terminowe() dim oZadanie for each oZadanie in oZadaniaCursor if oZadanie.dDataTerminRozp <> doc_.afc.globals.nulldate() and _ oZadanie.dDataTerminRozp <= dMainDate and _ oZadanie.dDataTerminZak <> doc_.afc.globals.nulldate() and _ oZadanie.dDataTerminZak >= dMainDate then dim iTaskTimeStart : iTaskTimeStart = (oZadanie.tCzasTerminRozp \ 100) dim iTaskTimeEnd : iTaskTimeEnd = (oZadanie.tCzasTerminZak \ 100) dim iHour for iHour = iTaskTimeStart to iTaskTimeEnd if iHour >= 0 and iHour < 24 then oCalBldrDay.currenthour = iHour with oCalBldrDay.cell if .userprop is nothing then set .userprop = doc_.createhlistr("vn1=0") ' licznik elementow end if set oParaCtrl = .addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PARAGRAPH,-1) oParaCtrl.border = 0 if .userprop.prop(1) mod 2 then oParaCtrl.backcolor=RGB(255,255,255) else oParaCtrl.backcolor=RGB(&HE6,&HE6,&HFA) end if add_zadanie_info oParaCtrl,oZadanie,(iHour = iTaskTimeStart),(iHour = iTaskTimeEnd) .userprop.prop(1) = .userprop.prop(1) + 1 end with end if next end if next end function function build_month_view(byval dMainDate) dim oParaCtrl dim pCBModule : set pCBModule = doc_.getmodule(60231) dim pContainerMth : set pContainerMth = page_.ctrl(CTRLID_CALENDAR_CONTAINER) pContainerMth.removeall dim oCalBldrMth : set oCalBldrMth = pCBModule.get_calendar_builder(pContainerMth,3,dMainDate) oCalBldrMth.build_frame dim oZadaniaCursor : set oZadaniaCursor = get_cursor_terminowe() dim oZadanie for each oZadanie in oZadaniaCursor dim dTaskDateStart, dTaskDateEnd #ifndef _RAND dTaskDateStart = oZadanie.dDataTerminRozp dTaskDateEnd = oZadanie.dDataTerminZak #else if oZadanie.nStatus >= N5ZADANIE_ZLECONE and oZadanie.nStatus <= N5ZADANIE_ZAKONCZONE _ and oZadanie.eTypterminRozp <> N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_NAJSZYBCIEJ and oZadanie.eTypterminRozp <> N5ZADANIE_ENDTYP_OBOJETNY then dTaskDateStart = oZadanie.dDataTerminRozp dTaskDateEnd = oZadanie.dDataTerminZak elseif oZadanie.nStatus >= N5ZADANIE_UTWORZONE and oZadanie.nStatus <= N5ZADANIE_WSTRZYMANE and oZadanie.dDataPrzyp <> trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() then dTaskDateStart = oZadanie.dDataPrzyp dTaskDateEnd = oZadanie.dDataPrzyp else dTaskDateStart = oZadanie.dDataZakon dTaskDateEnd = oZadanie.dDataZakon end if #endif if dTaskDateStart = doc_.afc.globals.nulldate() then dTaskDateStart = dTaskDateEnd end if if dTaskDateEnd = doc_.afc.globals.nulldate() then dTaskDateEnd = dTaskDateStart end if dim dDate for dDate = oCalBldrMth.firstday to oCalBldrMth.lastday if dTaskDateStart <= dDate and dTaskDateEnd >= dDate then oCalBldrMth.currentday = dDate with oCalBldrMth.cell if .userprop is nothing then set .userprop = doc_.createhlistr("vn1=0") ' licznik elementow end if set oParaCtrl = oCalBldrMth.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PARAGRAPH,-1) oParaCtrl.border = 0 if .userprop.prop(1) mod 2 then oParaCtrl.backcolor=RGB(255,255,255) else oParaCtrl.backcolor=RGB(&HE6,&HE6,&HFA) end if add_zadanie_info oParaCtrl,oZadanie,(dTaskDateStart = dDate),(dTaskDateEnd = dDate) .userprop.prop(1) = .userprop.prop(1) + 1 end with end if next next end function #comment '------------------------------------------------------------
